topic: Online Registration Form and Payment for New Admissions
summary: Details the online registration form for new admissions, its integration with online payment, and the process for receiving application fees and generating receipts.
navigation: External URL for the registration form
ERP > Admission > Application Data (to view submitted forms)
steps: Student fills out the online registration form (student name, photo, gender, email, phone, etc.).
Student proceeds to online payment for the application fee (e.g., 10,000 INR).
The payment gateway (Razorpay) processes the payment, including any applicable charges (GST, bank charges).
Upon successful payment, the transaction details and a receipt are recorded in the ERP under 'Admission > Application Data'.
The system can be configured to send the payment receipt and prospectus to the student's email ID.
business_rules: The registration form is integrated with a payment gateway (Razorpay).
Application fees are fixed (e.g., 10,000 INR) but can be made variable.
Admission number is generated after payment.
The receipt should be transferred to the student's email ID.
important_notes: The form is initially in a test gate for testing purposes; it will go live upon confirmation.
Payment gateway charges are separate from the application fee.
The phone number field needs a restriction for up to 12 digits.
The system will send both the payment receipt and the prospectus to the student's email after successful registration and payment.
questions: How does the online registration form work for new admissions?
What is the process for students to pay the application fee online?
Will students receive a receipt via email after paying the application fee?
Where can I view submitted registration forms and their payment status in the ERP?
Are there any charges for online application fee payments?
